settings.storageSourceHint: Option for cloud provider file system support. If options like S3 or Forge are available, they will be shown here.
settings.uploadDirectoryHint: Choose the directory where converted WebP images will be saved.
settings.uploadDirectoryGMHint: If not empty all GM uploads will go here.
settings.capturePasteEventsHint: (Requires reload) May potentially cause issues with other modules.
settings.qualityPercentHint: Qualuty of .webp format as a percentage (e.g., 90, 80, 70).
settings.maxSidePixelSizeHint: 0 = no resize. If the image is larger, it will be scaled proportionally.
settings.enabledForGmHint: Allows the GM to automate image conversion. No restart required.
settings.generateRandomFileNameName: Generate random name for each uploaded file
settings.generateRandomFileNameHint: Will cause a mess, but ensures the updated image appears immediately. Solves editing problem.

form.chooseFile: Choose, paste or drop an image:
form.uploadingNow: Please wait untill uploading is done.
form.dropHere: Drop an image here, or paste one from the clipboard. (Ctrl + V)
